tex:
The formula for changing a temperature measured in Celsius (°C) to Fahrenheit (°F) is
\[F = \frac{9C}{5} + 32.
\newline
\]

Use this formula to change 65°C to Fahrenheit.
\newline

\newline
\]

\newline

_rawBody:
